name: @swarm/profile-page
description: Public avatar profile pages for rati.chat

scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://${PROFILE_PAGE_BUCKET:-swarm-profile-page-staging} --delete
scripts.deploy:staging: PROFILE_PAGE_BUCKET=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name SwarmProfilePage-staging --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`ProfilePageBucketName`].OutputValue' --output text 2>/dev/null || echo 'swarm-profile-page-staging') pnpm run deploy
scripts.deploy:prod: PROFILE_PAGE_BUCKET=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name SwarmProfilePage-prod --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`ProfilePageBucketName`].OutputValue' --output text 2>/dev/null || echo 'swarm-profile-page-prod') pnpm run deploy
scripts.invalidate:staging: PROFILE_PAGE_DISTRIBUTION_ID=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name SwarmProfilePage-staging --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`ProfilePageDistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) pnpm run invalidate
scripts.invalidate:prod: PROFILE_PAGE_DISTRIBUTION_ID=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name SwarmProfilePage-prod --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`ProfilePageDistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) pnpm run invalidate
